title: The Static Crater
content: The world begins in a haze of acrid smoke and the smell of ozone. You are lying at the bottom of a shallow, glass-edged crater in the Borderlands. The red dust is swirling around you, but within the circle of the crater, everything is eerily still. A figure—Kaelen, a scavenger—is peering over the edge, their hand drifting toward a rusted iron knife. As Kaelen takes in your {player.height}, {player.bodyType} frame and {player.eyeType} eyes, they [NPC_REACT]. 'I don't know what void you leaked out of,' they call down, 'but you've sucked the life right out of the air. If you want a ride out of here, you're going to have to prove you aren't just a walking curse.'

choices.text: [RESONANCE] 'Your torch isn't dead. It's just... confused. Let me help.'
[DISTORTION] 'I'm not a curse. I'm the only thing in this desert that makes sense.'
[THE VOID] (Silently stand up and climb out of the crater).

title: Borderlands Outpost
content: You arrive at a cluster of makeshift shacks built from salvaged plating and reinforced glass. This is the Borderlands Outpost, a haven for those who survive on the edge of the Static. The air is thick with the sound of grinding gears and the occasional crackle of energy.
